title: 9 Soothing Herbal Teas for Programmer's Sore Eyes
description: Lavandula angustifolia teas have been used for centuries to soothe sore eyes. The tea contains compounds like linalool and linalyl acetate, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. These properties help to reduce swelling and fight off infections that can cause eye irritation.  When using Lavandula angustifolia teas for sore eyes, start by steeping a tea bag in boiling water for 5-7 minutes. Then, let it cool down before applying it to your closed eyes ...
